match-criterion.description:
A match criterion for window rules
https://github.com/glzr-io/glazewm?tab=readme-ov-file#window-rules

equals.description: Exact match for the window process name

includes.description: Substring match for the window process name

regex.description: Regex match for the window process name

not_equals.description: Negative exact match for the window process name

not_regex.description: Negative regex match for the window process name

equals.description: Exact match for the window title

includes.description: Substring match for the window title

regex.description: Regex match for the window title

not_equals.description: Negative exact match for the window title

not_regex.description: Negative regex match for the window title

equals.description: Exact match for the window class name

includes.description: Substring match for the window class name

regex.description: Regex match for the window class name

not_equals.description: Negative exact match for the window class name

not_regex.description: Negative regex match for the window class name

startup_commands.title: startup commands
startup_commands.description: Commands to run when the WM has started

shutdown_commands.title: shutdown commands
shutdown_commands.description: Commands to run just before the WM is shutdown

config_reload_commands.title: config reload commands
config_reload_commands.description: Commands to run after the WM config is reloaded

focus_follows_cursor.title: focus follows cursor
focus_follows_cursor.description: Whether to automatically focus windows underneath the cursor

toggle_workspace_on_refocus.title: toggle workspace on refocus
toggle_workspace_on_refocus.description: Whether to switch back and forth between the previously focused workspace when focusing the current workspace

enabled.title: enabled
enabled.description: Whether to automatically move the cursor on the specified trigger

hide_method.title: hide method
hide_method.description: How windows should be hidden when switching workspaces

show_all_in_taskbar.title: show all in taskbar
show_all_in_taskbar.description: Affects which windows get shown in the native Windows taskbar. Has no effect if hide_method is 'hide'

scale_with_dpi.title: scale with dpi
scale_with_dpi.description: Whether to scale the gaps with the DPI of the monitor

outer_gap.title: outer gap
outer_gap.description: Gap between windows and the screen edge. Can be a single string or an object with per-edge values

single_window_outer_gap.title: single window outer gap
single_window_outer_gap.description: Gap between a single window and the screen edge when it's the only window in the workspace. Same format as outer_gap

focused_window.title: focused window
focused_window.description: Visual effects to apply to the focused window

border.title: border
border.description: Highlight the window with a colored border. Exclusive to Windows 11 due to API limitations

hide_title_bar.title: hide title bar
hide_title_bar.description: Remove the title bar from the window's frame

corner_style.title: corner style
corner_style.description: Change the corner style of the window's frame. Exclusive to Windows 11 due to API limitations

transparency.title: transparency
transparency.description: Change the transparency of the window

other_windows.title: other windows
other_windows.description: Visual effects to apply to non-focused windows

border.title: border
border.description: Highlight the window with a colored border

hide_title_bar.title: hide title bar
hide_title_bar.description: Remove the title bar from the window's frame

corner_style.title: corner style
corner_style.description: Change the corner style of the window's frame

transparency.title: transparency
transparency.description: Change the transparency of the window

initial_state.title: initial state
initial_state.description: New windows are created in this state whenever possible

state_defaults.title: state defaults
state_defaults.description: Default options for when a new window is created

centered.title: centered
centered.description: Whether to center floating windows by default

shown_on_top.title: shown on top
shown_on_top.description: Whether to show floating windows as always on top

shown_on_top.title: shown on top
shown_on_top.description: Whether to show fullscreen windows as always on top

font_family.description:
A font family of the bar
https://github.com/glzr-io/glazewm?tab=readme-ov-file#bar-configuration

font_size.description:
A font size of the bar
https://github.com/glzr-io/glazewm?tab=readme-ov-file#bar-configuration

font_weight.description:
A font weight of the bar
https://github.com/glzr-io/glazewm?tab=readme-ov-file#bar-configuration

border_width.description:
A border width of the bar
https://github.com/glzr-io/glazewm?tab=readme-ov-file#bar-configuration

border_color.description:
A border color of the bar
https://github.com/glzr-io/glazewm?tab=readme-ov-file#bar-configuration

offset_x.title: offset x
offset_x.description:
A horizontal offset of the bar
https://github.com/glzr-io/glazewm?tab=readme-ov-file#bar-configuration

offset_y.title: offset y
offset_y.description:
A vertical offset of the bar
https://github.com/glzr-io/glazewm?tab=readme-ov-file#bar-configuration

border_radius.title: border radius
border_radius.description:
A border radius of the bar
https://github.com/glzr-io/glazewm?tab=readme-ov-file#bar-configuration

keep_alive.title: keep alive
keep_alive.description: Whether to keep the workspace alive when it has no windows

display_name.title: display name
display_name.description: Optional display name for the workspace, used in 3rd-party apps like Zebar

bind_to_monitor.title: bind to monitor
bind_to_monitor.description: Bind the workspace to a specific monitor index

match.title: match
match.description: Match criteria for this window rule. All criteria within a match item are ANDed together. Multiple match items are ORed together

on.title: on
on.description: Window events that trigger this rule. Defaults to [Manage, TitleChange]

run_once.title: run once
run_once.description: Whether to only run this rule once per window

name.title: name
name.description: The name of the binding mode

display_name.title: display name
display_name.description: Optional display name for the binding mode
